category.scope_note: Filtering respirators and face masks — China-to-Saudi Arabia compliance comparison under SASO/SABER requirements.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Filtering Respirator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国过滤式呼吸器进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距对照
title.zht: 中國過濾式呼吸器進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距對照

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese filtering respirator exports against Saudi Arabia requirements for SABER market access, EN 149 safety classes, importer obligations, product marking, and labelling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国过滤式呼吸器出口与沙特阿拉伯SABER市场准入、EN 149安全等级、进口商义务、标记与标签的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國過濾式呼吸器出口與沙特阿拉伯SABER市場准入、EN 149安全等級、進口商義務、標記與標籤的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a regulatory determination, legal opinion, certification decision, or customs ruling. Exporters and importers should verify official Saudi and China requirements with qualified professionals before production, shipment, or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成监管裁定、法律意见、认证决策或海关裁定。制造商、出口商和进口商在生产、出运和销售前应向合格专业人员核验官方沙特与中国要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成監管裁定、法律意見、認證決策或海關裁定。製造商、出口商及進口商在生產、出貨和銷售前應向合格專業人士核驗官方沙特與中國要求。

answer_first.en: For Saudi Arabia, the highest-impact commercial gaps are SABER PCoC and per-consignment SCoC documents, Saudi-recognized EN 149/NIOSH-linked performance claims for filtering respirators, mandatory in-country importer flow, and Arabic safety labelling. GB 2626-2019 or GB 19083 certificates are technical baselines in China, not direct substitutions for Saudi compliance workflow.
answer_first.zh: 进入沙特时，最关键的商业差距是SABER PCoC与每批SCoC文件、适用于过滤式呼吸器的沙特认可EN 149/NIOSH型性能要求、在地进口商流程，以及阿拉伯语安全标签。GB 2626-2019或GB 19083证书是中国的技术基准，并不能直接替代沙特合规流程。
answer_first.zht: 進入沙特時，最關鍵的商業差距是SABER PCoC與每批SCoC文件、適用於過濾式呼吸器的沙特認可EN 149/NIOSH型性能要求、在地進口商流程，以及阿拉伯語安全標籤。GB 2626-2019或GB 19083證書是中國的技術基準，並不能直接取代沙特合規流程。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update rows when SASO notices, SABER workflow rules, or standard-adoption statements are revised; keep all sources with publisher, accessed date, verified=false, and last_verified current.
